properties.name: grails.profile
properties.description: The active Grails application profile (e.g., web, rest-api, plugin).

properties.name: grails.codegen.defaultPackage
properties.description: The default package used when generating artefacts with grails create-* commands.

properties.name: grails.serverURL
properties.description: The server URL used to generate absolute links (e.g., https://my.app.com) and used by redirects.

properties.name: grails.enable.native2ascii
properties.description: Whether to perform native2ascii conversion of i18n properties files.

properties.name: grails.bootstrap.skip
properties.description: Whether to skip execution of BootStrap.groovy classes on startup.

properties.name: grails.spring.bean.packages
properties.description: List of packages to scan for Spring beans.

properties.name: grails.spring.disable.aspectj.autoweaving
properties.description: Whether to disable AspectJ auto-weaving.

properties.name: grails.spring.placeholder.prefix
properties.description: The prefix for property placeholder resolution.

properties.name: grails.spring.transactionManagement.proxies
properties.description: Whether to enable Spring proxy-based transaction management since @Transactional uses an AST transform and proxies are typically redundant.

properties.name: grails.plugin.includes
properties.description: List of plugin names to include in the plugin manager (all others excluded).

properties.name: grails.plugin.excludes
properties.description: List of plugin names to exclude from the plugin manager.

properties.name: grails.reload.includes
properties.description: List of fully qualified class names to include in development reloading, when set only these classes are reloaded.

properties.name: grails.reload.excludes
properties.description: List of fully qualified class names to exclude from development reloading.

properties.name: grails.events.spring
properties.description: Whether to bridge GORM/Grails events to the Spring ApplicationEventPublisher, allowing EventListener methods to receive domain events.

properties.name: grails.json.legacy.builder
properties.description: Whether to use the legacy JSON builder.

properties.name: grails.converters.json.domain.include.class
properties.description: Whether to include the class property when marshalling domain objects to JSON.

properties.name: grails.converters.xml.domain.include.class
properties.description: Whether to include the class attribute when marshalling domain objects to XML.

properties.name: grails.i18n.cache.seconds
properties.description: How long (in seconds) to cache resolved message bundles with -1 to cache indefinitely and 0 to disable caching.

properties.name: grails.i18n.filecache.seconds
properties.description: How long (in seconds) to cache the message bundle file lookup with -1 to cache indefinitely.

properties.name: grails.gorm.failOnError
properties.description: When true, save() throws ValidationException on validation failure instead of returning null and can also be a list of package names to apply selectively.

properties.name: grails.gorm.autoFlush
properties.description: Whether to automatically flush the Hibernate session between queries.

properties.name: grails.gorm.flushMode
properties.description: The default Hibernate flush mode (AUTO, COMMIT, MANUAL).

properties.name: grails.gorm.markDirty
properties.description: Whether to mark a domain instance as dirty on an explicit save() call.

properties.name: grails.gorm.autowire
properties.description: Whether to autowire Spring beans into domain class instances.

properties.name: grails.gorm.default.mapping
properties.description: A closure applied as the default mapping block for all domain classes.

properties.name: grails.gorm.default.constraints
properties.description: A closure applied as the default constraints for all domain classes.

properties.name: grails.gorm.custom.types
properties.description: Map of custom GORM types.

properties.name: grails.gorm.reactor.events
properties.description: Whether to translate GORM events into Reactor events, which is disabled by default for performance.

properties.name: grails.gorm.events.autoTimestampInsertOverwrite
properties.description: Whether auto-timestamp (dateCreated) overwrites a user-provided value on insert.

properties.name: grails.gorm.multiTenancy.mode
properties.description: The multi-tenancy mode: DISCRIMINATOR, DATABASE, SCHEMA, or NONE.

properties.name: grails.gorm.multiTenancy.tenantResolverClass
properties.description: Fully qualified class name of the TenantResolver implementation.
properties.defaultValue: required when mode is not NONE

properties.name: dataSource.driverClassName
properties.description: The JDBC driver class name.

properties.name: dataSource.username
properties.description: The database username.

properties.name: dataSource.password
properties.description: The database password.

properties.name: dataSource.url
properties.description: The JDBC connection URL.

properties.name: dataSource.dbCreate
properties.description: The schema generation strategy: create-drop, create, update, validate, or none, use none in production with a migration tool.

properties.name: dataSource.pooled
properties.description: Whether to use a connection pool.

properties.name: dataSource.logSql
properties.description: Whether to log SQL statements to stdout.

properties.name: dataSource.formatSql
properties.description: Whether to format logged SQL for readability.

properties.name: dataSource.dialect
properties.description: The Hibernate dialect class name or class.

properties.name: dataSource.readOnly
properties.description: Whether the DataSource is read-only (calls setReadOnly(true) on connections).

properties.name: dataSource.transactional
properties.description: For additional datasources, whether to include in the chained transaction manager.

properties.name: dataSource.persistenceInterceptor
properties.description: For additional datasources, whether to wire up the persistence interceptor (the default datasource is always wired).

properties.name: dataSource.jmxExport
properties.description: Whether to register JMX MBeans for the DataSource.

properties.name: dataSource.type
properties.description: The connection pool implementation class when multiple are on the classpath.
